name: malicious-packages-test-repo
description: Test repo for malicious packages detection on DEV tenant (real OSV.dev entries, installable from npm registry)
_comment: All entries below verified against the public OSV API (api.osv.dev) AND the npm registry (registry.npmjs.org) on 2026-05-23. Picking installable malicious versions matters because most malicious packages are unpublished by npm after detection (replaced with a placeholder 0.0.1-security stub), making them impossible to npm/pnpm install. The packages below still have their malicious version tarballs available. See ./README.md for expected scan results.
